{{Infobox character
| name = Esh’kinaar
| species = Alien
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|spell cancellation, spawn magic, consume World Spirits}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Swarm-Queen]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|, queen of psychic insects}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[D’Niss]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Dark Space]], behind the local sun}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

''See also: [[Esh’kinaar Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Esh’kinaar, known as the [[Swarm-Queen]] of the [[D’Niss]], is a massive psychic insect that poses a significant threat to the galaxy. Historically encountered by the second generation of [[Titan Knights]], she is characterized by her immense size; when positioned within a system, her presence is large enough to warp planetary orbits and be visible in the night sky. Though she has been defeated in the past, she remains a legendary figure that necessitates galactic defense. Esh’kinaar possesses formidable abilities, including the use of combat arts that project [[diamond]]-shaped crescents and a form of biological conjuration magic used to create new [[D’Niss]]. Her entrance into the current dimension was described as an overwhelming disruption of the [[Aether]]. She has also been known to reside near stars, appearing as a dark silhouette against solar radiance. Her power is such that she has even produced a successor through her spawn magic, resulting in the birth of a new [[Swarm-Queen]].}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Esh’kinaar]] is the [[Swarm-Queen]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A psychic insect queen that lurks within [[Dark Space]], Esh’kinaar was prevented from being summoned when the [[Titan Force]] drove the [[D’Niss]] from the galaxy. This star-eating entity is an accomplished spellcaster characterized by wings of wispy rainbows, a gaze akin to weaponized [[Subspace]], and an oil-shimmering carapace reinforced with black-[[diamond]] thoracic plates. Hovering slightly behind the local sun, she possesses the power to limit magic via spell cancellation. Through her spawn magic, Esh’kinaar can consume [[World Spirits]] to convert them into new creatures and create fresh versions of the [[D’Niss]]. Even following her death, she left a lingering force behind.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Force]] drove the [[D’Niss]] from the galaxy before [[Esh’kinaar]] could be summoned.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10">''The Knight'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] is a star-eating psychic insect that lurks in [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] is a queen of psychic insects.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] is an accomplished spellcaster.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] has a carapace that shimmers like spilled oil and is armed with black-[[diamond]] plates on her thorax.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] has wings made of wispy rainbows.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]]'s gaze is like weaponized [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] hovers over and slightly behind the local sun.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] has the ability to limit magic through spell cancellation.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] left behind a force through her death.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] possesses spawn magic which is a form of conjuration used to create new versions of the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] can consume [[World Spirits]] by breaking them down and converting them into new creatures.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Esh’kinaar]] is a swarm that [[The Last Horizon]] can make war against.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Esh’kinaar]] is an apocalyptic enemy who has brought the narrator to the brink of death.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
